task.query:
(i) Calculate the statistics below for the level of public concern regarding each topic:

\begin{tabular}{lll}
\hline & Genetically modified food & Intensive pesticide use \\
\hline Median & & \\
Lower quartile & & \\
Upper quartile & & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
task.answer:
\begin{tabular}{lll}
\hline & Genetically modified food & Intensive pesticide use \\
\hline Median & 3 & 1 \\
Lower quartile & 2 & 1 \\
Upper quartile & 4 & 2 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

task.query: (ii) Illustrate the data using box and whisker plots.
task.answer: (ii) The level of public concern regarding the genetically modified food and intensive pesticide use ( $n-20$ in each case)

meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
